content.text:
ACSS gives you the ability to style forms from WS Form with a single utility class.

Don't own a license? You can get 30% off a license as an ACSS user by clicking here and using code 'ACSS' at checkout.

WS Form is currently the most powerful and flexible form plugin with the highest quality support in the WordPress ecosystem, which is exactly why we chose it as the flagship form system for ACSS compatibility.

content.title: Submit Button Style
content.tooltip: Expects the name of a button style (primary, secondary, etc.). You can attach '.btn--outline' to style name for outline variations
